message:
feat: Complete Q2_K support in streaming engine (Phase 1.3)

Added Q2_K compressed mode support to heterogeneous streaming engine:

Streaming Engine (streaming_qwen.zig):
- Added Q2KLayerOffsets field and use_q2k flag
- New initQ2K() constructor for Q2_K compressed mode
- Updated warmResidentLayers() to support both Q8 and Q2_K
- Added copyLayerQ2KToHeap() for Q2_K heap caching
- Imported dequantize_simd module for CPU dequantization

Model Configuration (qwen_model.zig):
- Added q2kBlockBytes() helper (84 bytes / 256 values)
- Added Q2KLayerOffsets struct with init() and totalSize()
- Mirrors Q8LayerOffsets structure for Q2_K format

GGUF Loader (gguf_loader.zig):
- Fixed Q2_K enum case (.q2_k not .q2_K)

With Q2_K mode, all 64 layers of 32B model fit in ~10GB RAM:
- Q8_0: 420MB/layer × 24 layers = 10GB (partial fit)
- Q2_K: 160MB/layer × 64 layers = 10GB (FULL MODEL!)

Next: Phase 2 - Integration with main CLI
